message:
feat(abi): promote getdate family to native — zero host delegations in unistd_abi

Replace the final 3 host-delegated symbols with native implementations:
- getdate — native DATEMSK template-based date parser using our strptime
- getdate_r — reentrant variant
- getdate_err removed from host_resolve (now set by native getdate_core)

Host delegation count in unistd_abi.rs: 3 → 0

This completes the full elimination of all 57 host delegations that
were in unistd_abi.rs at the start of this session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
